messages.meaning: Normal beta oil pressure lost. Beta backup system active. No feathering capability.
messages.immediate: If intermittent: land as soon as practical. If steady: land as soon as possible.

messages.meaning: Prop lever(s) not at MAX RPM for take-off.
messages.immediate: Advance prop lever(s) to MAX RPM.

messages.meaning: Autofeather system armed. All three arming conditions met.
messages.immediate: Advisory — normal at take-off power. Confirm ARM light.
